#  Open Invoices in the Payments Tool 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
##  Background 
Procore's Company level Payments tool provides users with the ability to open and view invoices in your company's projects.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Enable the Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-procore-pay)
  * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Subcontractor Invoices** tab.
  3. In the table, locate the invoice to open. 
#####  Tip
**Too many invoices in the list?** To find the right invoice, perform a search or apply filters to narrow the data showing in the table. See [Search](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payments-admin-guide/apply-search-and-filter-options)[ for and Apply Filters on the Subcontractor Invoices Tab](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payments-admin-guide/apply-search-and-filter-options). You can also click the 'Invoice #' column heading to change the sort order.
  4. Click its **Invoice #** link.   
![Open A Project Invoice](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/19c8e129d5cda64782876e89a6ee5898/daccda8e7d6c6c395f655830c58c9461/open-a-project-invoice.png?fm=webp)  
  
This launches the Project level Commitments tool and opens the invoice with the General tab showing by default. 
#####  Tip
**Want to learn more about invoices?** See [About Subcontractor Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/about-subcontractor-invoices).


## See Also
  * [About the Subcontractor Invoices Tab in the Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/about-the-subcontractor-invoices-tab-in-the-payments-tool)
  * [View Sub-Tier Information on a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/view-sub-tier-information-on-a-subcontractor-invoice)
  * [Search for and Apply Filters on the Subcontractor Invoices Tab](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/search-for-and-apply-filters-on-the-subcontractor-invoices-tab)
title: Open Invoices in the Payments Tool
description: To open a project invoice in the Company level Payments tool.
